promptComposer.maskHint: Upload an image, then paint the area you want to edit.
promptComposer.editHintWithCanvas: Current image is ready. You can add up to 2 style references.
promptComposer.editHintNoCanvas: Upload the base image you want to edit.
promptComposer.describeGenerate: Describe what you want to create
promptComposer.placeholderGenerate: A serene mountain landscape at sunset with a lake reflecting the golden sky...
promptComposer.placeholderEdit: Make the sky more dramatic and add storm clouds...
promptComposer.clearConfirmText: Are you sure you want to clear this session? This will remove all uploads, prompts, and canvas content.

promptHints.title: Prompt Quality Tips

subject.text: Be specific about the main subject

scene.example: "in a cobblestone alley during golden hour"

camera.example: "shot with 85mm lens, shallow depth of field"

promptHints.bestPractice: Best practice: Write full sentences that describe the complete scene, not just keywords. Think "paint me a picture with words."
